title: Live Risk Cue
description: Live v1 risk cue contract for suppressing or escalating live sales cues when risk conditions appear.
$comment: Sources: PACK-08, TECH-08, and PACK-10. Complaint, health-sensitive issue, recall, sale lock, privacy risk, and P0 risk must win over sales cues. TODO: official risk type/severity enum is not locked.

risk_type.description: Risk type. TODO: define official live risk taxonomy.

severity.description: Risk severity. TODO: define official severity enum.

host_action.description: Recommended host action. TODO: define official host action enum.

suppress_sales.description: Whether sales cues must be suppressed.

handoff_required.description: Whether private or human handoff is required.
